description: Remove deal-related advisory accruals included in accrued expenses (debt-like / settled pre-close)
rationale: Accruals for sell-side process, diligence, and financing fees inflate current liabilities; typically excluded from peg as non-operating / transaction-specific.

description: Remove one-time ERP vendor payable from accounts payable (debt-like implementation liability)
rationale: ERP implementation payable is non-operating and expected to be settled outside of working capital; excluding increases peg to a sustainable operating baseline.

description: Normalize accrued annual bonus to target run-rate (increase liability)
rationale: Bonus accrual at Jun-2026 appears below expected run-rate based on policy and YTD performance; adjustment reduces peg to reflect expected annual payout.
Portion of AR >120 days relates to disputed billings on legacy implementations; reserve reduces peg to collectible balances.

description: Remove contract assets related to unapproved change orders (reduce contract assets)
rationale: Unapproved change orders are not yet billable/collectible and should not support peg; adjustment aligns contract assets to realizable amounts.

description: Exclude indirect tax payable included in other current liabilities (non-operating / excluded from NWC definition)
rationale: Sales/VAT payable is typically excluded from NWC in the SPA definition; removing increases peg comparability to market practice.

description: Accrue under-recorded SaaS platform/vendor fees (increase liability)
rationale: Vendor fee accrual appears understated versus contract schedule; adjustment reduces peg to reflect contractual run-rate obligations.

description: Exclude non-operating vendor prepayment from prepaids/other current assets (reduce asset)
rationale: Prepayment relates to a multi-year marketing sponsorship and is not required for ongoing operations; typically excluded from peg as non-operating.

description: Deferred revenue cut-off true-up for services billed in advance but substantially delivered (reduce deferred revenue)
rationale: Portion of deferred revenue appears to relate to services already delivered but not released; reducing liability increases peg and aligns to delivery status.

description: Remove litigation reserve from accrued expenses (debt-like / settlement-specific)
rationale: Litigation reserve relates to a discrete settlement matter and is not part of ongoing operating working capital; typically treated as debt-like.
